brand.name: MechLib
brand.description: Premium Library Management Web App for Mechanical Engineering Department

surfaces.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-slate-900/70 border border-white/40 dark:border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]

layout.spacing: Generous spacing philosophy (p-6, p-8 for cards). Maintain internal padding for bordered containers.
layout.login_page: Centered high-impact card over an animated background. Glassmorphism is mandatory here.
layout.admin_dashboard: Mode B (Control Room Grid). Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Sidebar with standard items.
layout.user_dashboard: Clean grids, cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Emphasize card clarity.

components.inputs: Shadcn standard but strictly with rounded-lg borders. Use inline validation via react-hook-form.
components.tables: Shadcn Table with clean, border-b only rows. Ensure robust hover states.
components.status_chips: Implement custom dynamic badges (e.g., bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 for returned, amber for pending).
components.toast: Use Sonner for toast notifications, bottom-right placement.
components.role_selector: Use Shadcn Tabs or RadioGroup styled as large distinct hit-area buttons for Admin vs User.
components.charts: Recharts for placeholder borrowing trends and popular books.

animations.page_load: Framer Motion staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0, duration: 0.4)
animations.login_background: Animated abstract floating shapes (gears, books) using Framer Motion SVG elements slowly rotating/drifting.

testing.required_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

login_fallback_bg.description: Abstract blue geometric pattern for fallback use if animated SVG is disabled.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with the specified colors (slate/navy base, amber/gold accent) and fonts (Outfit, IBM Plex Sans).
Implement the login page with a centered glassmorphism card and an animated background featuring subtle floating gears and books (using framer-motion).
Ensure both Light and Dark themes are supported, and explicitly color text on hover states.
Admin Dashboard: Build the left sidebar, summary cards, and dynamic Issue Book panel that auto-populates book titles.
User Dashboard: Ensure clear distinction between available/unavailable books. Build the borrowing history timeline.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive UI components (buttons, links, form inputs).
